title: Simple Roasted Red Potatoes
ingredients: ¼ cup extra virgin olive oil
instructions:
Adjust the oven rack to the lowest position.
In a large bowl, toss the potatoes with the olive oil, salt and pepper.
Arrange the potatoes, cut side down on a large foil cookie sheet.
Roast for 20-30 minutes or until golden brown and tender.
Transfer to a serving dish.
